community.pacemaker.pacemaker_authentica.short_description: Authenticate pcs to pcsd on nodes specified.
community.pacemaker.pacemaker_authentica.description: Manages the pcs tokens file either directly or through pcs auth commands. Authenticate pcs to pcsd on nodes specified. Tokens are stored in /var/lib/pcsd/tokens for root or ~/.pcs/tokens for other users. Using the local parameter only authenticates the local node but by default all nodes are authenticated to each other. Using the force parameter forces re-authentication to occur. Supports removal of hosts from the pcsd tokens file. We simply remove the data. No other action is performed. It

community.pacemaker.pacemaker_cluster.short_description: Manage a Pacemaker Cluster and the nodes within it..
community.pacemaker.pacemaker_cluster.description: Manage a Pacemaker Cluster and the nodes within it. Manages the /etc/corosync/corosync.conf file either directly or through pcs cluster commands.

community.pacemaker.pacemaker_constraint.short_description: Manage Constraints for a Pacemaker Cluster.
community.pacemaker.pacemaker_constraint.description: Manage Constraints for a Pacemaker Cluster. At the moment this module will only create or remove the constraint Verification is performed by name only. This module is very simple and will likely not support advanced constraint configurations.

community.pacemaker.pacemaker_fence.short_description: Manage Fences for a Pacemaker Cluster.
community.pacemaker.pacemaker_fence.description: Manage Fences for a Pacemaker Cluster. At the moment this module will only create or remove the fence. Verification is performed by name only.

community.pacemaker.pacemaker_resource.short_description: Create and manage resources within a Pacemaker cluster.
community.pacemaker.pacemaker_resource.description: Create and manage resources within a Pacemaker cluster. This module does not check resource configuration for changes. To update a resource you can delete it before recreating.
